_meta.method: Web search + targeted fetches of operator sites (zenbuddhismus.at, buddhismus-austria.at, mishoan.at, bodhidharmazendo.at, zen.wien, zengruppe-wien.at, zen-meditation.wien, sanghainnsbruck.at, kannon-do.at, sanbo-zendo-hallein.at, puregg.at, werkraumtheater.at, bergzendo.at, zenklagenfurt.at, zen-azi.org, kwanumeurope.org, plumvillage.org, interseinwien). Cross-checked via Austrian Buddhist Union (ÖBR) directory and IRIZ Hanazono Zen Centers list.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Estimated 75-85% of publicly listed active Zen sanghas in Austria. ÖBR-registered Zen orders, AZI Soto dojos, Rinzai (Bodhidharma/Sasaki line), Sanbo Zen Hallein, Plum Village/Intersein sanghas, and Kwan Um Vienna are covered. Likely missing: small private home sittings, Christian-Zen circles in parishes (Lassalle/Jaeger line via Stille in Wien is included), and Vorarlberg satellite contacts that publish only contact persons (no fixed address).
knownGaps: Vorarlberg: only individual contact persons (Bregenz, Lustenau) under Puregg/Phoenix Cloud; no fixed public address
Wake Up Wien meeting address withheld (request via email) — included as sangha but address null
Private Sanbo Zen home groups in Vienna affiliated with Stille Insel could not be independently sourced beyond stille-in-wien.at
Several rural retreat venues (Kloster Maria Luggau, Stift Reichersberg, GEA Akademie Schrems, Stift Zwettl) are used as sesshin venues by Zengruppe Wien but are not standalone Zen centers — excluded
Possible smaller AZI affiliate dojos (e.g., reported but unverified groups in Tirol/Salzburg)

places.name: Bodhidharma Zendo Wien
places.notes: Founded 1979. Abbot Seigaku Kigen Osho. ÖBR-registered. Headquarters of an association with affiliated zendos in Graz and Klagenfurt and a country retreat (BergZendo).

places.name: Bodhidharma Zendo Graz
places.notes: Affiliated branch of Bodhidharma Zendo (Vienna). Distinct from the Soto/Deshimaru Zen Dojo Graz at Werkraum.

places.name: Zen Zentrum Klagenfurt (Bodhidharma Zendo)
places.address: Tristangasse 28, 9020 Klagenfurt (Inselreich – Haus der Energie und Bewegung)
places.notes: Klagenfurt branch of Bodhidharma Zendo. Zazen Wed 18:00-21:00 and Fri 06:30-08:00.

places.name: Hyakujōgan Zendo (BergZendo)
places.notes: Country retreat zendo of Bodhidharma Zendo Wien at ~900m elevation; hosts sesshins and zazenkais.

places.name: Zen Dojo Wien Mushoju
places.notes: Daily zazen in the Soto line; affiliated with Association Zen Internationale (AZI) founded by Taisen Deshimaru.

places.name: Zen Dojo Graz (Werkraumtheater)
places.notes: Soto Zen in the Deshimaru lineage; led by Franz Blauensteiner and Rezka Kanzian. AZI-affiliated. AZI office address listed as Weißeneggergasse 3, 8020 Graz.

places.name: Zengruppe Wien / Zendo Rosinagasse
places.lineage: Zen (Willigis Jäger / Hsin Tao line, Soto-Sanbo hybrid)
places.notes: Christoph Singer, authorized as Zen teacher by Willigis Jäger and by Hsin Tao (Taiwan). Hosts sesshins at Stift Reichersberg, Maria Luggau, Stift Zwettl and other venues.

places.name: Zen Zentrum Mishoan
places.notes: Founded 2006 by Dr. Fleur Sakura Wöss and Mag. Paul Hogen Matusek. ÖBR-registered Zen order; own 120m² zendo since 2008.

places.name: Vienna Zen Center (Kwan Um School of Zen)
places.lineage: Kwan Um (Korean Seon, Seung Sahn line)
places.notes: Kwan Um School of Zen Austria, founded 1994; ÖBR-registered order.

places.name: Puregg – Haus der Stille (Jakkoji)
places.lineage: Sōtō (Kobun Chino Roshi line / Phoenix Cloud Sangha)
places.notes: Mountain retreat at ~1300m, active since 1989. Co-founded by Brother David Steindl-Rast and Vanja Palmers. Direction: Angelika Genshin Eller. Note: country brief suggested Sanbō Zen affiliation, but operator and ÖBR list it as Soto/Kobun-Phoenix Cloud.

places.name: SANBO ZENDO Hallein
places.notes: Led by Claudia Petschnig. Affiliated with Sanbō Zen International (Yasutani / Yamada Koun line).

places.name: Zendo Innsbruck (Bodhidharma)
places.notes: Rinzai zendo in Innsbruck listed historically under Herbert Koudela; affiliated with the Bodhidharma/Sasaki line.

places.name: Kannon-Do Zen-Buddhistisches Zentrum Innsbruck
places.notes: Teacher Peter Chikurin Pfötscher; Soto in the Kobun Chino line.

places.name: Zen Gruppe Salzburg
places.notes: Salzburg Rinzai group; teacher Herbert Koudela in the Sasaki/Bodhidharma Zendo network.

places.name: Zen Gruppe Linz
places.notes: Linz Rinzai group, teacher Herbert Koudela; part of the Sasaki/Bodhidharma Zendo network.

places.name: Zendo Wien (Karl Obermayer)
places.notes: Vienna Zen group around teacher Karl Obermayer; sesshin venues include Sonnenhofgasse 3.

places.name: Stille in Wien – Zen-Meditation
places.lineage: Christian-Zen (Hugo Enomiya-Lassalle / Sansui-an / Zendo Betania line)
places.notes: Zen practice with Dr. Ursula Baatz (Sansui-an, Escuela Zen 'Zendo Betania') in the Lassalle line. Hosted at Kardinal König Haus.

places.name: Intersein Sangha Wien
places.lineage: Vietnamese Thiền / Plum Village (Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Active since 1998. Weekly Thursday practice 17:30. Part of the Intersein/Plum Village Dhyana School.

places.name: Wake Up Wien
places.lineage: Vietnamese Thiền / Plum Village (Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Young-adults sangha (~18-35) in the Plum Village tradition. Address shared on request.

places.name: Plum Village Sangha Innsbruck
places.lineage: Vietnamese Thiền / Plum Village (Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Active since 2019. Meets Thursdays 18:00–19:30 at Yoga Mitte.

places.name: Intersein Sangha Hall in Tirol
places.lineage: Vietnamese Thiền / Plum Village (Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Tyrolean Intersein/Plum Village group listed on the Intersein Wien links page.
